--- Kenku — Unarmored Caster's turn ---

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 12 falling damage. HP: 166/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Kenku — Unarmored Caster's turn ---

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===

Young Red Dragon attacks Kenku — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 15] MISS.

--- Kenku — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kenku — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Kenku — Unarmored Caster.
→ Kenku — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 10/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kenku — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 24 damage. Kenku — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
→ Kenku — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 5 vs DC 12]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
